title: London, England — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to London, England: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

London is a city in England with a population of 8,799,800. A global financial and cultural capital with world-class museums, diverse neighborhoods, and unmatched career opportunities — but housing costs are steep.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
